subcodes.first_line: This is a Book sent down in truth from One mighty and all-knowing unto her who hath believed in her Lord and attained unto the recognition of God [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: هذا کتاب نزل بالحق من لدن عزیز علیما للتی آمنت بربها و فازت بعرفان الله فی
subcodes.subjects: @praise and encouragement, @consolation and comfort, @steadfastness; perseverance; faithfulness
